# Contract Generated by GPT-4.1

**Model ID:** `gpt-4.1`

---

## Freelance Service Agreement

### Preamble

This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 (the "Effective Date"), by and between TechStartup Inc., a California corporation, with its principal place of business at [Insert Address], represented by Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director ("Client"), and Chen Creative Studio, a California creative studio, with its principal place of business at [Insert Address], represented by Alex Chen, Senior Designer ("Freelancer").

### Recitals

WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer to perform a complete visual identity redesign project, known as the Brand Refresh 2025, including but not limited to logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines; and WHEREAS, Freelancer has the professional capacity and expertise to perform such services; NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual promises and covenants herein contained, the parties agree as follows:

---

## Clauses (15 total)

### Scope of Services

*Type: standard*

Freelancer shall provide all professional services necessary to complete the Brand Refresh 2025 project as described herein, including (i) presenting three (3) initial logo concepts, (ii) refining the selected logo, (iii) developing a comprehensive brand guidelines document outlining visual identity standards (logo, color palette, typography, usage), and (iv) delivering the final asset package as per project specifications.

### Deliverables and Timeline

*Type: standard*

The Freelancer shall deliver the following items according to the corresponding deadlines: (a) Three (3) logo concepts by January 30, 2025; (b) Refined selected logo by February 15, 2025; (c) Brand guidelines document by March 1, 2025; (d) Final asset package by March 15, 2025. Timely delivery is of the essence under this Agreement.

### Payment Terms

*Type: standard*

The total compensation for the services under this Agreement shall be Eight Thousand Five Hundred Dollars ($8,500), payable as follows: (a) Deposit of $2,550 due upon execution of this Agreement; (b) $2,000 upon delivery of logo concepts; (c) $1,500 upon delivery of the refined selected logo; (d) $2,500 upon delivery of the brand guidelines document; and (e) $2,500 upon delivery of the final asset package. Payments must be made within ten (10) calendar days of each milestone delivery and accompanying invoice. Late payments shall accrue interest at the lesser of 1.5% per month or the maximum rate allowed by law.

### Revisions

*Type: standard*

Freelancer will provide up to three (3) rounds of reasonable revisions on the deliverables described herein. Additional revisions requested by Client beyond the initial three (3) rounds will be billed at Freelancer’s standard hourly rate of $120 per hour, subject to Client’s prior written approval.

### Client Responsibilities

*Type: standard*

Client agrees to provide timely feedback, any necessary materials, content, and access reasonably required by Freelancer to perform the services. Delays in providing such information may result in reasonable adjustments to the project timeline.

### Intellectual Property

*Type: standard*

Upon Client’s full payment of all amounts due, all rights, title, and interest in and to the final approved deliverables (excluding any Freelancer pre-existing materials or third-party materials) shall transfer to Client. Freelancer retains ownership of, and a perpetual, non-exclusive license to use, any preliminary concepts and rejected drafts for self-promotion and portfolio purposes.

### Confidentiality

*Type: standard*

Freelancer agrees to keep confidential and not disclose any proprietary or confidential information received from Client, except as necessary to perform the services. This obligation survives the termination of this Agreement.

### Independent Contractor Status

*Type: standard*

Freelancer is engaged as an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed as creating a partnership, joint venture, employer-employee, or agency relationship. Freelancer is solely responsible for all federal, state, and local taxes, insurance, and benefits.

### Termination

*Type: standard*

Either party may terminate this Agreement upon fifteen (15) days’ written notice. Upon termination, Freelancer shall be compensated for all work completed up to the effective date of termination. If cancellation occurs before the deposit or any milestone payment(s) are exhausted by completed work, the unearned portion shall be refunded to Client within ten (10) business days; any work completed and accepted shall be paid for at the agreed rates.

### Warranties and Representations

*Type: standard*

Freelancer represents and warrants that the deliverables will not infringe any third party’s intellectual property rights, and shall be original works created solely by Freelancer. Client represents and warrants that any materials provided to Freelancer are owned by Client or Client is authorized to use them.

### Limitation of Liability

*Type: standard*

Except for liability arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or breach of sections regarding confidentiality or intellectual property, neither party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, special, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or relating to this Agreement.

### Dispute Resolution

*Type: standard*

Any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be resolved first through good faith negotiations between the parties. If unresolved, either party may submit the dispute to mediation in California. The prevailing party in any litigation or arbitration shall be entitled to reasonable attorneys’ fees and costs.

### Governing Law

*Type: standard*

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflicts of law principles.

### Entire Agreement and Amendments

*Type: standard*

This Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof, and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements. Any amendments or modifications must be in writing and signed by both parties.

### Notices

*Type: standard*

All notices under this Agreement must be in writing and shall be deemed given (i) upon personal delivery, (ii) on the date sent by email if confirmed by a return email, or (iii) three (3) days after being mailed by certified mail, return receipt requested, to each party at their address as stated above (or as later designated in writing).
